News.pageDescription: Campaigns, announcements and the latest from Lumia.
News.ctaDescription: Don’t miss campaigns and updates — reserve your spot at our Bomonti salon.

Blog.pageDescription: Hair care, nail care and beauty tips from Lumia experts in Bomonti, Istanbul.
Blog.ctaDescription: Plan hair and nail care at our Bomonti salon online in seconds.

Hero.title: Make Time for You, Discover Your Glow
Hero.description: Expert hair and nail care at Lumia, in a warm atmosphere — book in seconds with our smart appointment system.

Home.introDescription: With our experienced specialists and premium products, we're here to make you feel renewed with every visit.
Home.spotlightSubtitle: Discover the most requested transformation from our Lumia experts
Home.gallerySubtitle: Take a look at our newest hair and nail creations
Home.ctaBandDescription: Pick your favorite specialist and time slot in under 60 seconds.

Services.pageDescription: Everything you need for hair and nail care, in expert hands with premium products.
Services.notFoundDescription: The service you're looking for doesn't exist or may have been removed.
Services.emptyFilter: No services in this category yet.

fon.name: Blow-dry
fon.shortDescription: Long-lasting, voluminous blow-dry with professional brush technique.
fon.description: Our expert stylists create a natural, voluminous, long-lasting blow-dry tailored to your hair type, using the right brush and heat techniques — perfect for everyday shine or a special occasion.

sac-kesim.name: Haircut
sac-kesim.shortDescription: Personalized cut consultation suited to your face shape.
sac-kesim.description: With a detailed consultation before every cut, we determine the style that best suits your face shape, hair texture and lifestyle, blending classic and trending techniques.

sac-boyama.name: Hair Coloring
sac-boyama.shortDescription: Vibrant, healthy results from a personalized color analysis.
sac-boyama.description: From global color to balayage, ombre and root touch-ups, our professional application uses premium products that protect your hair's health.

manikur.name: Manicure
manikur.shortDescription: A classic manicure for a polished, elegant look.
manikur.description: Combining hand and nail care, our classic manicure service leaves your hands looking polished and elegant.

pedikur.name: Pedicure
pedikur.shortDescription: Full renewal with foot care and relaxing touches.
pedikur.description: Including exfoliation, moisture treatment and professional nail shaping, our pedicure service will leave your feet feeling brand new.

kalici-oje.name: Gel Polish
kalici-oje.shortDescription: Weeks of shine and color that lasts.
kalici-oje.description: Applied with UV/LED curing technology, our gel polish keeps its shine for weeks without chipping or fading.

protez-tirnak.name: Nail Extensions
protez-tirnak.shortDescription: Long, durable, natural-looking nails with gel or acrylic technique.
protez-tirnak.description: Shaped with gel or acrylic technique based on your needs, our nail extensions offer a natural look with high durability.

Portfolio.pageDescription: A curated selection of hair and nail work by the Lumia team.

About.heroTitle: Where Beauty Meets Care and Expertise
About.heroDescription: Lumia was founded to turn beauty care into a warm, welcoming experience. We aim for every guest to leave our salon feeling better than when they arrived.
About.valueQualityDesc: An experienced team that's always learning.
About.valueCareDesc: A personalized, fully attentive approach for every guest.
About.valueQualityProductsDesc: Quality products that prioritize hair and skin health.
About.teamDescription: Meet our expert stylists and nail care specialists.

Contact.pageDescription: Reach out with questions, or book an appointment directly.

Footer.description: Lumia — hair & nail care in a modern, warm atmosphere.

Booking.waGreeting: Hi Lumia, I'd like to book an appointment.

Testimonials.quote1: This is the first time my hair color has looked this natural and vibrant. I truly trust the Lumia team.
Testimonials.quote2: Booking was incredibly easy, and the salon is just as warm and elegant. I highly recommend it.
Testimonials.quote3: My nail extensions still look as good as day one, weeks later. You can really tell the care they put in.
